evaluation_protocol.one_shot_prompt_contract: The public spec exposes a coarse transient behavior envelope sufficient for a single repair submission without revealing root cause, gold code, checker source, or private thresholds.
evaluation_protocol.feedback_track_note: A future feedback/debug track should reuse task assets only under a separate runner protocol and separate pass@K score table.

notes: agent_prompt.md is a thin task wrapper; public/agent_visible_spec.md is the shared agent-visible behavior contract.
The agent-visible spec removes root-cause wording, checker IDs, private sample windows, and fixed coefficient hints.
The agent-visible spec exposes the broad transient envelope needed for one-shot repair without revealing the private implementation fix.
Support and private gold artifacts are copied into v2 so the task is self-contained.
Private checker policy is behavior-first; it does not require alpha, a fixed coefficient, timer cadence, or a specific implementation template.

private_diagnostics.single_root_cause: The buggy source updates too slowly for the intended transient response.

private_checker_contract.implementation_constraints: The checker is behavior-first and must not require private variable names, exact coefficients, timer cadence, or a fixed implementation template.

directive: This release task card is private benchmark/evaluator metadata. Do not render it into agent prompts.
